\[
I_1=\int_a^b t^2\sin t\,dt=\Bigl[-t^2\cos t+2t\sin t+2\cos t\Bigr]_a^b,

\[
I_2=\int_a^b t^2\cos t\,dt=\Bigl[t^2\sin t+2t\cos t-2\sin t\Bigr]_a^b,
\]
and
